## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and workflow updates.](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production will be adjusted to 8 articles/week for the next two weeks due to GrowthX's workflow evaluation pause](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Search query analysis reveals opportunities in HR topics, language translations, and templates](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [New Airtable view provides improved visibility into content planning and prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Recent performance shows increased clicks (214) despite fewer impressions (67.2k) due to indexing issues](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Adjustment

  - [Reducing to 8 articles/week for next two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [6 new articles + 2 refreshes/enriched pieces per week](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [GrowthX pausing new article generation for workflow evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
  - [Team will work on research and analysis during the pause](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)

### Airtable Content Management

  - [New monthly view implemented for better visibility](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [172 total articles, 8 awaiting review, 10 ready by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Flexibility to adjust view and add features (e.g., checkboxes, flags)](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Jessica can prioritize articles by moving them to "Ready to Start"](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)

### Performance Update

  - [67.2k impressions, 214 clicks (up from 184 last week)](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Safety Alert template showing good traction](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Steady growth in backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Uptick in LLM traffic](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [YourCo now 2nd in share of voice among competitors](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)

### Search Query Analysis Insights

  - [Long-tail keywords often questions/informational queries](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Opportunities in HR-sensitive topics (e.g., absenteeism, discipline)](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Translation-related queries suggest expanding to more languages](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Templates (e.g., time-off request forms) show high potential](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Internal/External Linking Strategy

  - [AI model improved for contextually relevant internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Aim for 3-8 internal links per article, manually adding at least 3](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [New workflow allows specifying target pages for internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [External link repetition issue noted and to be addressed](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)

### Technical SEO Updates

  - [FAQ and article schema implementation planned (1 month timeline)](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [YourCo changed from "nofollow" to "follow" for improved authority transfer](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to prepare 6 new articles for review by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [Implement search query analysis insights into content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Enhance internal linking between related articles (e.g., incident reporting)](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
  - [Address external link repetition issue](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [Utilize high-traffic resource pages in new articles for improved positioning](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Monitor performance of newly indexed articles for potential refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/9ctoadPmKMPUSFA4Dw6nCNsj1jR8j9Fk?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
